description:
This quiz tests intermediate to advanced knowledge of AWS storage services, covering S3, DynamoDB, Aurora, RDS, and ElastiCache with best practices and tricky gotchas. The teaching tone is playful and engaging, using emojis and a conversational style to make learning fun.
Topics: AWS Storage Services, S3, DynamoDB, Aurora, RDS, ElastiCache
Audience: Cloud practitioners, AWS users, developers, and architects
